sql_queries: What is the total rainfall of the year 2010 in Bihar?
gold_sql:
SELECT SUM(l.rainfall_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) = 2010;

sql_queries: What is average Rainfall in the month of june,july,sept in year 2000 in west bengal?
gold_sql:
SELECT avg(l.rainfall_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%West Bengal%'
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) IN (6,7,9)
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) = 2000;

sql_queries: find the Maximum Temperature of kolkata in 2000.?
gold_sql:
SELECT MAX(l.temperature_value) AS max_temperature
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_TEMPERATURE" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON l.location_id = d.district_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON d.state_id = s.state_id
WHERE d.district_name ILIKE '%kolkata%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.temperature_recorded_date) = 2000;

sql_queries: Which state has the highest rainfall in 2010?
gold_sql: SELECT s.state_name, SUM(l.rainfall_value) AS total_rainfall FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d ON d.district_id = l.location_id JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s ON s.state_id = d.state_id WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) = 2010 GROUP BY s.state_name ORDER BY total_rainfall DESC LIMIT 1;

sql_queries: Show the yearly rainfall of Bihar between 2000 and 2010?
gold_sql:
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) AS year,
       SUM(l.rainfall_value)
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND s.state_name ILIKE '%Bihar%'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) BETWEEN 2000 AND 2010
GROUP BY year
ORDER BY year;

sql_queries: Which state has the highest rainfall in 2010?
gold_sql:
SELECT s.state_name, SUM(l.rainfall_value) AS total_rainfall
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RAINFALL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.rainfall_recorded_date) = 2010
GROUP BY s.state_name

sql_queries: Top 5 States by Max reservoir Level in 2010
gold_value:
tamil nadu
kerala
karnataka
odisha
uttarakhand
gold_sql:
SELECT s.state_name,
       MAX(l.level) AS max_level
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2010
GROUP BY s.state_name
ORDER BY max_level DESC
LIMIT 5;

maharashtra

gold_sql:
SELECT s.state_name,
       SUM(l.current_live_storage) AS total_reservoir_live_storage
FROM npcyf_schema."LOCATION_RESERVOIR_LEVEL" AS l
JOIN npcyf_schema."DISTRICT" AS d
  ON d.district_id = l.location_id
JOIN npcyf_schema."STATE" AS s
  ON s.state_id = d.state_id
WHERE l.location_type = 'DISTRICT'
  AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM l.reservoir_level_recorded_date) = 2010
GROUP BY s.state_name
ORDER BY total_reservoir_live_storage DESC
LIMIT 5;

sql_queries: top 5 district by average temperature in 2023
gold_value:

east godavari | 29.5013515981735160
